name: Bat Wing
obtainMethod: Dropped by Bats in the mines
description: A leathery wing dropped by cave bats.

name: Bone Fragment
obtainMethod: Dropped by Skeletons in the mines and found on Ginger Island
description: A jagged piece of bone from a skeleton.

name: Cave Carrot
obtainMethod: Found in crates in the mines (floors 1–20) or by digging artifact spots
description: A starchy snack found in the mines.

name: Fiber
obtainMethod: Cut weeds with a Scythe or by walking through them
description: Coarse plant fiber used in crafting.

name: Frozen Geode
obtainMethod: Mining rocks in the mines (floors 41–79)
description: A cold stone containing frozen minerals. Break open at the Blacksmith.

name: Geode
obtainMethod: Mining rocks in the mines (floors 1–39) or cracking rocks on the farm
description: A rough stone that contains minerals. Break open at the Blacksmith for 25g.

name: Green Algae
obtainMethod: Caught while fishing in rivers, lakes, and ponds
description: A common algae found in freshwater.

name: Hardwood
obtainMethod: Chop Large Stumps and Large Logs with a Copper Axe or better
description: A dense and valuable wood used in advanced crafting.

name: Magma Geode
obtainMethod: Mining rocks in the mines (floors 81–120)
description: A hot stone containing volcanic minerals. Break open at the Blacksmith.

name: Maple Syrup
obtainMethod: Tap a Maple Tree with a Tapper (takes about 9 days)
description: A sweet, golden syrup harvested from maple trees.

name: Mixed Seeds
obtainMethod: Found by cutting weeds, or purchased. Grows into a random seasonal crop.
description: A handful of mixed crop seeds. Will grow into a random seasonal crop.

name: Moss
obtainMethod: Harvested from mossy trees using a Scythe
description: Soft green moss that grows on certain trees.

name: Oak Resin
obtainMethod: Tap an Oak Tree with a Tapper (takes about 7 days)
description: A sticky amber resin from oak trees. Used in crafting kegs.

name: Omni Geode
obtainMethod: Mining rocks throughout the mines, from monsters, and from Prospector's Guild
description: A special geode that may contain any type of mineral. Break open at the Blacksmith.

name: Pine Tar
obtainMethod: Tap a Pine Tree with a Tapper (takes about 5 days)
description: A dark, sticky tar from pine trees. Used in crafting.

name: Sap
obtainMethod: Chop trees with an Axe; drops from trees as a byproduct
description: A sticky goo that's a common byproduct of cutting trees.

name: Seaweed
obtainMethod: Found on the beach or caught while fishing
description: A green ocean plant often washed ashore.

name: Slime
obtainMethod: Dropped by Slimes in the mines and Slime Hutch
description: A gooey, sticky substance dropped by slimes. Used in crafting.

name: Solar Essence
obtainMethod: Dropped by Metal Heads and Squid Kids in the mines
description: The glowing essence of a Metal Head or Squid Kid.

name: Squid Ink
obtainMethod: Dropped by Squid Kids, or produced by Squid/Midnight Squid in a Fish Pond
description: An inky substance produced by squids.

name: Stone
obtainMethod: Break rocks with a Pickaxe on the farm, in mines, and around the valley
description: A common material used for crafting and building.

name: Vinegar
obtainMethod: Purchase from Pierre's General Store for 200g, or process Rice in a Keg
description: An acidic liquid used in many recipes.

name: Void Essence
obtainMethod: Dropped by Shadow Brutes and Shadow Shamans in the mines and Witch's Swamp
description: A dark, swirling essence dropped by shadow creatures.

name: White Algae
obtainMethod: Caught while fishing in the mines
description: A pale algae found in the underground lakes.

name: Wood
obtainMethod: Chop trees and branches with an Axe on the farm and in the forest
description: A basic material used for crafting and construction.
